titlestmt.author: Compiled by Brenda Marston, Andrea Hektor

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-08-05 00:11:04 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: Undetermined, Code for undetermined script script.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Miscellaneous popular fiction collection
did.abstract: Erotic and pornographic novels in the pulp paperback format on a variety of subjects including swinging, bisexuality, sadomasochism, incest, and bestiality.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Erotic and pornographic novels in the pulp paperback format on a variety of subjects including swinging, bisexuality, sadomasochism, incest, and bestiality.

arrangement.head: COLLECTION ARRANGEMENT
arrangement.p: Books are listed alphabetically by author. Title, publisher, series and series number if applicable (-0- if not), and date are also given.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Miscellaneous Popular Fiction Collection, #7691. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
